case_title: RICHARD HARDACK VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2024 BY CAROLYN GOLD. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KARINA MUNOZ. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $573.00 FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KARINA MUNOZ FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2024 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO SEP-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KARINA MUNOZ. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDACK, RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. $76.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $106.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. [HEARING DATE JULY-29-2024 AT 3:30 PM]
